headline: ₹100-400 Cr at risk (cost of capital, valuation compression, compliance costs) — Adani Power secures $3.7B coal deals, raising ESG scrutiny amid India's energy demand surge
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], TCFD, CDP, GRI triggered; non-disclosure risks SEBI trading restrictions.
Possible P/E compression (5-10%) as TCFD/CDP non-alignment deters FII and ESG funds.
Potential 20-40bps increase in cost of capital due to negative ESG signal and SEBI scrutiny.
